description: A list of i18n language resources supported by the YouTube website.
name: I18nLanguageListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#i18nLanguageListResponse.

items.description: A list of supported i18n languages.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#i18nLanguage.

id.description: The ID uniquely identifying the i18n language.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the i18n language.

hl.description: A BCP-47 code that uniquely identifies a language.

name.description: The name of the language as it is written in the language itself.
